prestazioni: Engine: Replace the factory 426ci (7.0L) HEMI (engine code: A102) with a fully built, forged internals version featuring a Callies DragonSlayer crankshaft (4.25" stroke), Manley H-beam connecting rods, and JE forged pistons (12.5:1 compression ratio) for 800+ HP on race gas. Pair with a custom camshaft grind from Comp Cams (258°/264° duration, .650" lift) and a ported/polished cylinder head by Indy Cylinder Head with oversized Ferrea valves and titanium retainers.

Forced Induction: Twin Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbochargers (88mm, .96 A/R) mounted on a custom stainless steel header system by Stainless Works, feeding into a dual-inlet Precision Turbo wastegate (60mm) with external dump tubes. Intercooling via a custom air-to-water setup with a PWR radiator and Bosch 044 fuel pump auxiliary cooling loop. Fuel system upgraded to dual Aeromotive A1000 fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID2000x injectors, and a Holley Dominator ECU with custom tuning by Lund Racing.

Drivetrain: Replace the factory A833 4-speed manual with a Tremec TKX 5-speed (close-ratio) paired to a McLeod twin-disc RST clutch and billet flywheel. Rear end upgraded to a Moser 9" housing with 3.90:1 gears, Strange Engineering S60 axles, and a Detroit Truetrac differential. Suspension overhauled with QA1 double-adjustable coilovers (2.5" front, 3.0" rear), Hotchkis subframe connectors, and a Global West tubular control arm kit with poly bushings.
estetica: Body: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using a Rare Classics "Hemi Cuda" kit (1970-specific, 4" flares) with custom-fabricated steel inner fenders for tire clearance. Front splitter and rear diffuser by RK Sport, paired with a functional hood scoop from Harwood (4" ram-air). Paint: BASF Glasurit custom mix "Hemi Orange" with black pearl flakes and a matte clear coat by House of Kolor.

Wheels/Tires: Front: Forgeline GA3R 18x10.5" (ET15) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R 285/35/18 tires. Rear: Forgeline GA3R 18x13" (ET0) with Mickey Thompson ET Street R 335/30/18 drag radials. Brake system: Baer 6P 6-piston calipers (14" rotors) up front, Wilwood 4-piston calipers (12" rotors) in the rear, with stainless steel braided lines and Motul RBF660 fluid.

Interior: Full roll cage by Chassisworks (8-point, NHRA-certified) with custom aluminum door panels by Just Dashes. Seats: Corbeau GTS II Pro (SFI-rated) with Schroth 6-point harnesses. Steering wheel: NRG Innovations 13.5" suede wheel on a Tilton quick-release hub. Gauges: AEM CD-7 dash with wideband O2, boost, and oil pressure sensors, mounted in a custom aluminum panel by Dakota Digital.
